_doc.what: THE swap surface — Codex Orbit's instance of the Orbit Kit (see ORBIT_KIT.md). Every product-specific identity value derives from the canonical fields below.
_doc.note: Codex Orbit ADOPTS the kit's Patches toggle system + this config surface, but KEEPS its own proven install/OTA flow in Codex Orbit/extension.js. Reason: Codex's patcher is asset-replay, version-pinned to the certified Codex build (stable_version.txt) and fails closed on an unverified Codex, so enable() must pin --version. The kit's Claude-tuned no-pin install flow is intentionally NOT used.

description: Power-up for Codex: pin, archive, filter, search, and live status.
